title_en: Introduction to The Exquisite Pearl: The Journey to Allah
title_ar: مقدمة الدرة الفاخرة في رحلة الآخرة
content_en: The Exquisite Pearl: The Journey to Allah is a work by Ibn Rajab Al Hanbali covering important aspects of Islamic aqeedah. This text has been made available as part of the Islam.wiki library for the benefit of Muslims seeking authentic Islamic knowledge.
